title: Virtual reality environment based manipulation of multi-layered multi-view interactive digital media representations
abstract: Various embodiments of the present disclosure relate generally to systems and methods for generating multi-view interactive digital media representations in a virtual reality environment. According to particular embodiments, a plurality of images is fused into a first content model and a first context model, both of which include multi-view interactive digital media representations of objects. Next, a virtual reality environment is generated using the first content model and the first context model. The virtual reality environment includes a first layer and a second layer. The user can navigate through and within the virtual reality environment to switch between multiple viewpoints of the content model via corresponding physical movements. The first layer includes the first content model and the second layer includes a second content model and wherein selection of the first layer provides access to the second layer with the second content model.
claims:
Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A method comprising: obtaining a plurality of images having location information and an object, wherein the plurality of images include at least a portion of overlapping subject matter; fusing, via a processor, the plurality of images into a first content model and a first context model, wherein the first content model includes a multi-view interactive digital media representation of the object and the first context model includes a multi-view interactive digital media representation of scenery surrounding the object; generating, via a processor, a virtual reality environment using the first content model and the first context model, the virtual reality environment configured such that a user can navigate through and within the virtual reality environment to switch between multiple viewpoints of the first content model via corresponding physical movements, wherein the virtual reality environment includes a first layer and a second layer, wherein the first layer includes a first depth and the second layer includes a second depth; wherein the first layer includes the first content model and the second layer includes a second content model and wherein selection of the first layer provides access to the second layer with the second content model. 2. The method of claim 1, wherein access to the second content model is provided through a pop-up window. 3. The method of claim 1, wherein the second content model is configure such that the user can switch between multiple viewpoints of the second content model via corresponding physical movements. 4. The method of claim 1, wherein both content models are configured such that a user can control 360 degrees of the angle and view of a content model within the virtual reality environment. 5. The method of claim 1, wherein the virtual reality environment includes action tabs for assisting in manipulation of the content model. 6. The method of claim 1, wherein the second layer is accessed via selection of an embedded object in the first content model. 7. The method of claim 1, wherein selection of an embedded object in the second content model in the second layer allows access to a third content model in a third layer. 8. A system for generating multi-view interactive digital media representations in a virtual reality environment comprising: a processor; and memory, the memory comprising instructions for: obtaining a plurality of images having location information and an object, wherein the plurality of images include at least a portion of overlapping subject matter; fusing, via a processor, the plurality of images into a first content model and a first context model, wherein the first content model includes a multi-view interactive digital media representation of the object and the first context model includes a multi-view interactive digital media representation of scenery surrounding the object; generating, via a processor, a virtual reality environment using the first content model and the first context model, the virtual reality environment configured such that a user can navigate through and within the virtual reality environment to switch between multiple viewpoints of the first content model via corresponding physical movements, wherein the virtual reality environment includes a first layer and a second layer, wherein the first layer includes a first depth and the second layer includes a second depth; wherein the first layer includes the first content model and the second layer includes a second content model and wherein selection of the first layer provides access to the second layer with the second content model. 9. The system of claim 8, wherein access to the second content model is provided through a pop-up window. 10. The system of claim 8, wherein the second content model is configure such that the user can switch between multiple viewpoints of the second content model via corresponding physical movements. 11. The system of claim 8, wherein both content models are configured such that a user can control 360 degrees of the angle and view of a content model within the virtual reality environment. 12. The system of claim 8, wherein the virtual reality environment includes action tabs for assisting in manipulation of the content model. 13. The system of claim 8, wherein the second layer is accessed via selection of an embedded object in the first content model. 14. The system of claim 8, wherein selection of an embedded object in the second content model in the second layer allows access to a third content model in a third layer. 15. A non-transitory computer readable medium comprising instructions to execute a method for generating multi-view interactive digital media representations in a virtual reality environment, the method comprising: obtaining a plurality of images having location information and an object, wherein the plurality of images include at least a portion of overlapping subject matter; fusing, via a processor, the plurality of images into a first content model and a first context model, wherein the first content model includes a multi-view interactive digital media representation of the object and the first context model includes a multi-view interactive digital media representation of scenery surrounding the object; generating, via a processor, a virtual reality environment using the first content model and the first context model, the virtual reality environment configured such that a user can navigate through and within the virtual reality environment to switch between multiple viewpoints of the first content model via corresponding physical movements, wherein the virtual reality environment includes a first layer and a second layer, wherein the first layer includes a first depth and the second layer includes a second depth; 

 wherein the first layer includes the first content model and the second layer includes a second content model and wherein selection of the first layer provides access to the second layer with the second content model. 16. The non-transitory computer readable medium of claim 15, access to the second content model is provided through a pop-up window. 17. The non-transitory computer readable medium of claim 15, wherein the second content model is configure such that the user can switch between multiple viewpoints of the second content model via corresponding physical movements. 18. The non-transitory computer readable medium of claim 15, wherein both content models are configured such that a user can control 360 degrees of the angle and view of a content model within the virtual reality environment. 19. The non-transitory computer readable medium of claim 15, wherein the virtual reality environment includes action tabs for assisting in manipulation of the content model. 20. The non-transitory computer readable medium of claim 15, wherein the second layer is accessed via selection of an embedded object in the first content model.
